debug_info.goal:
μ : ℝ
v p : NNReal
t : ℝ
S : Set ℝ := Icc (μ - 2 * √↑v) (μ + 2 * √↑v)
c011 : ∀ x ∈ S, |Real.exp (t * x)| ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √↑v))
⊢ Integrable (fun x => Real.exp (t * x)) (ProbabilityTheory.semicircleReal μ v)

      exact c012

by_cases hv : v = 0
        · simp [hv, semicircleReal_zero_var]
        ·
          have hS :
              (semicircleReal μ v) (Sᶜ) = 0 := by
            have habs : semicircleReal μ v ≪ volume :=
              semicircleReal_absolutelyContinuous (μ := μ) (v := v) hv
            apply habs
            have hvol : volume (Sᶜ) = 0 := by
              have hsupp : (Function.support (semicirclePDFReal μ v)) ⊆ S := by
                simpa [S] using (support_semicirclePDF_inc μ v)
              have hzero : ∀ x, x ∉ S → semicirclePDFReal μ v x = 0 := by
                intro x hxS
                have : x ∉ Function.support (semicirclePDFReal μ v) := fun hx ↦ hxS (hsupp hx)
                simpa [Function.mem_support] using this
              have hzero' : ∀ x, x ∈ Sᶜ → semicirclePDFReal μ v x = 0 := by
                intro x hx; exact hzero x (by simpa using hx)
              have hmeas : MeasurableSet Sᶜ := by
                have : MeasurableSet S := by
                  simpa [S] using (measurableSet_Icc : MeasurableSet (Icc (μ - 2 * √v) (μ + 2 * √v)))
                simpa using this.compl
              have :
                  semicircleReal μ v (Sᶜ) =
                    ENNReal.ofReal (∫ x in Sᶜ, semicirclePDFReal μ v x) := by
                simpa using semicircleReal_apply_eq_integral (μ := μ) (v := v) hv (Sᶜ)
              have : semicircleReal μ v (Sᶜ) = 0 := by
                rw [this]
                have : (∫ x in Sᶜ, semicirclePDFReal μ v x) = 0 := by
                  have : (fun x ↦ semicirclePDFReal μ v x) =ᵐ[volume.restrict (Sᶜ)] 0 := by
                    refine ae_of_all _ ?_
                    intro x hx
                    exact hzero' x hx
                  simpa using (integral_eq_zero_of_ae_eq_zero this)
                simp [this]
              have : volume (Sᶜ) = 0 := by
                -- using `withDensity` representation and the fact that density is zero on `Sᶜ`
                -- we already obtained measure zero for `semicircleReal`; absolute continuity gives volume zero
                exact (Measure.absolutelyContinuous_ae_eq habs).1 (by simpa [Measure.ae_iff] using this)
              exact this
            exact hvol
          have hSae : (Sᶜ : Set ℝ) =ᵐ[semicircleReal μ v] (∅ : Set ℝ) :=
            Measure.ae_eq_bot.2 hS
          have hSa : ∀ᵐ x ∂(semicircleReal μ v), x ∈ S := by
            have : ∀ᵐ x ∂(semicircleReal μ v), x ∉ Sᶜ := by
              simpa [Measure.ae_iff, S] using hS
            simpa using this
          filter_upwards [hSa] with x hxS
          have := c011 x hxS
          simpa using this
      have hconst :
          Integrable (fun _ : ℝ ↦ (Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v)))) (semicircleReal μ v) := by
        simpa using (integrable_const (Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v))))
      exact Integrable.of_norm_bounded (f := fun x ↦ Real.exp (t * x))

      sorry

· exact (measurable_exp.comp ((measurable_const.mul measurable_id))).aestronglyMeasurable

have c012 : ∀ᵐ x ∂(semicircleReal μ v), x ∈ S := by
        by_cases hv : v = 0
        · subst hv
          simp [semicircleReal_zero_var, S]
        ·
          have hvol : volume (Sᶜ) = 0 := by
            have hSmeas : MeasurableSet S := by
              simp [S]
            simpa [S] using (volume_Icc_compl_eq_zero (a := (μ - 2 * √(v : ℝ))) (b := (μ + 2 * √(v : ℝ))))
          have habs : semicircleReal μ v ≪ volume := semicircleReal_absolutelyContinuous (μ := μ) (v := v) hv
          have hμnull : semicircleReal μ v (Sᶜ) = 0 := habs hvol
          have : (∀ᵐ x ∂(semicircleReal μ v), x ∉ Sᶜ) := by
            simpa [Measure.ae_iff, hμnull]
          simpa [not_not] using this
      have c013 : (∀ᵐ x ∂(semicircleReal μ v), ‖Real.exp (t * x)‖ ≤ ‖Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v))‖) := by
        filter_upwards [c012] with x hx
        have := c011 x hx
        simpa using this
      refine integrable_of_ae_bounded ?_ (Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v))) c013
      simp

have hS :
              ∀ᵐ x ∂(semicircleReal μ v), x ∈ S := by
            have hsup :
                Function.support (semicirclePDF μ v) ⊆ S := by
              have hsup' : Function.support (semicirclePDFReal μ v) ⊆ S := by
                simpa [S] using support_semicirclePDF_inc (μ := μ) (v := v)
              intro x hx
              have hx' : x ∈ Function.support (semicirclePDFReal μ v) := by
                simpa [semicirclePDF, Function.support, semicirclePDFReal_nonneg] using hx
              exact hsup' hx'
            have hzero :
                (∀ x, x ∉ S → semicirclePDF μ v x = 0) := by
              intro x hxS
              have : x ∉ Function.support (semicirclePDF μ v) := by
                intro hxSupp
                exact hxS (hsup hxSupp)
              simpa [Function.mem_support] using this
            have hvol :
                (∀ᵐ x ∂volume, x ∉ S → semicirclePDF μ v x = 0) := by
              exact ae_of_all _ hzero
            have hS' : ∀ᵐ x ∂volume.withDensity (semicirclePDF μ v), x ∈ S := by
              have : ∀ᵐ x ∂volume.withDensity (semicirclePDF μ v), x ∉ S → False := by
                simpa using (withDensity_ae_eq_of_ae_eq_of_forall₀ (μ := volume) (f := semicirclePDF μ v)
                  (s := Sᶜ) (by
                    have : (∀ᵐ x ∂volume, x ∈ Sᶜ → semicirclePDF μ v x = 0) := by
                      simpa [Set.compl_compl] using hvol
                    exact this))
              filter_upwards [this] with x hx
              by_contra hxS
              exact hx hxS
            simpa [semicircleReal_of_var_ne_zero μ hv, S] using hS'
          filter_upwards [hS] with x hxS
          have := c011 x hxS
          simpa [Real.norm_eq_abs] using this
        refine integrable_of_ae_bound_const ?_ hbound
        ·
          have : (semicircleReal μ v) univ < ∞ := by
            simpa using (measure_lt_top (μ := semicircleReal μ v) Set.univ)
          simpa using this
    sorry
